rules: external-read plugins require reviewed non-sensitive payloads
external-write plugins require approval for meaningful writes
reject hidden downloads, hidden destinations, or permission bypass

plugins.notes: Track changed files locally without external routing.
Support local review workflows with visible output.
Run visible local quality gates without hidden installs or external routing.
Provide local git status, history, and diff summary with visible output.
Fetch reviewed non-sensitive documentation content from known destinations.
Sync issue comments or state changes only with approval and clear destination.
